name: headless-oracle
description: Real-time market status (OPEN/CLOSED/HALTED/UNKNOWN) for 28 global exchanges (equities, derivatives, and 24/7 crypto) with Ed25519 signed receipts. Designed for AI agents and automated trading systems. Fail-closed: any error defaults to CLOSED.

tools.name: get_market_status
tools.description: Check if an exchange is currently OPEN, CLOSED, HALTED, or UNKNOWN. Returns a cryptographically signed Ed25519 receipt. Input: MIC code (XNYS, XNAS, XBSP, XLON, XPAR, XSWX, XMIL, XHEL, XSTO, XIST, XSAU, XDFM, XJSE, XSHG, XSHE, XHKG, XJPX, XKRX, XBOM, XNSE, XSES, XASX, XNZE, XCBT, XNYM, XCBO, XCOI, XBIN). ALWAYS check before executing any trade.

tools.name: get_market_schedule
tools.description: Get the next open and close times for a specific exchange, including holidays and early close days. Input: MIC code.

tools.name: list_exchanges
tools.description: List all 28 supported exchanges with names, MIC codes, timezones, mic_type (iso|convention), and current status.
